verses.1: Sing aloud to God, our strength!
verses.2: Raise a song, and bring here the tambourine,
verses.3: Blow the trumpet at the New Moon,
verses.4: For it is a statute for Israel,
verses.5: He appointed it in Joseph for a covenant,
verses.6: “I removed his shoulder from the burden.
verses.7: You called in trouble, and I delivered you.
verses.8: “Hear, my people, and I will testify to you,
verses.9: There shall be no strange god in you,
verses.10: I am the LORD, your God,
verses.11: But my people didn’t listen to my voice.
verses.12: So I let them go after the stubbornness of their hearts,
verses.13: Oh that my people would listen to me,
verses.14: I would soon subdue their enemies,
verses.15: The haters of the LORD would cringe before him,
verses.16: But he would have also fed them with the finest of the wheat.
